name: Protein Dialysis and Buffer Exchange

components.name: 1. Prepare dialysis tubing or membrane device

note.en: Tubing: boil in 2% NaHCO₃ + 1 mM EDTA 10 min, rinse thoroughly. Slide-A-Lyzer: soak in buffer 2 min. MWCO: 3.5 kDa (<20 kDa protein), 12–14 kDa (most proteins), 50 kDa (large complexes).
note.zh: 透析袋：2% NaHCO₃ + 1 mM EDTA 煮 10 min，彻底冲洗。Slide-A-Lyzer：缓冲液浸泡 2 min。MWCO：3.5 kDa（<20 kDa 蛋白）、12–14 kDa（大多数蛋白）、50 kDa（大型复合体）。

note.en: Sample expands ~10–20% by osmosis. Seal securely.
note.zh: 渗透作用导致样品膨胀 ~10–20%。密封牢固。

components.name: 3. Dialyze change 1: 500 mL buffer, 2 h, 4°C, gentle stirring

note.en: ≥200× volume ratio. Slow stir bar (no foam = no protein denaturation).
note.zh: ≥200 倍体积比。慢速搅拌（无泡沫 = 无蛋白变性）。

components.name: 4. Dialyze change 2: fresh 500 mL buffer, 2 h, 4°C

note.en: Each change removes >90% of target small molecule.
note.zh: 每次换液去除 >90% 的目标小分子。

note.en: Add 10% glycerol to final buffer if storing at −80°C.
note.zh: 若需 −80°C 保存，末次透析液加 10% 甘油。

note.en: Volume may increase. Quantify: Bradford or BCA. Concentrate if needed: Amicon Ultra (4,000×g, 4°C).
note.zh: 体积可能增加。Bradford 或 BCA 定量。如需浓缩：Amicon Ultra（4,000×g，4°C）。

notes.en: Faster alternatives: (a) HiTrap Desalting column (5 mL, 5 min on AKTA); (b) Amicon Ultra centrifugal filter + dilution (3 cycles removes >99.9%); (c) ZebaSpin Desalting Column (2 min spin). Amicon: do not let protein dry on membrane.
notes.zh: 更快替代方案：(a) HiTrap Desalting 脱盐柱（5 mL，AKTA 5 min）；(b) Amicon Ultra 离心浓缩管 + 稀释换液（3 次去除 >99.9%）；(c) ZebaSpin 脱盐柱（2 min）。Amicon 注意勿让蛋白干在膜上。

ref: Scopes (1994) Protein Purification 3rd ed.; Wingfield (2001) Curr Protoc Protein Sci A.3B.1; ThermoFisher Slide-A-Lyzer Manual

materials.name: Magnetic stir bar and stir plate

stoppingPoints.condition: 4°C in final buffer or −80°C with glycerol

usage.en: Remove small molecules, exchange buffer, or desalt proteins by dialysis.
usage.zh: 透析法去除小分子、换液或蛋白脱盐。

briefSteps.en: Prepare and pre-wet dialysis tubing/cassette (appropriate MWCO) → load protein sample with headspace → dialyze in ≥200× volume dialysis buffer at 4°C with gentle stirring, changing buffer 3 times (2 h + 2 h + overnight) → recover sample and quantify.
briefSteps.zh: 准备并预湿透析袋/透析盒（选适当 MWCO）→ 留出膨胀空间装入蛋白样品 → 4°C 轻柔搅拌下在 ≥200 倍体积透析液中透析，换液 3 次（2 h + 2 h + 过夜）→ 回收样品并定量。

detailedSteps.en: Select dialysis tubing or membrane cassette with appropriate MWCO: 3.5 kDa for proteins <20 kDa, 12–14 kDa for most proteins, 50 kDa for large complexes. For traditional tubing: boil in 2% NaHCO₃ + 1 mM EDTA for 10 min, then rinse thoroughly with ddH₂O. For Slide-A-Lyzer cassettes: pre-wet by soaking in dialysis buffer for 2 min.
detailedSteps.zh: 根据目标蛋白大小选择 MWCO：<20 kDa 蛋白用 3.5 kDa，大多数蛋白用 12–14 kDa，大型复合体用 50 kDa。传统透析袋：2% NaHCO₃ + 1 mM EDTA 煮 10 min 后彻底冲洗；Slide-A-Lyzer 透析盒：透析液浸泡 2 min 预湿。

detailedSteps.en: Load protein sample into dialysis tubing or cassette, leaving 15–20% headspace to accommodate the 10–20% volume expansion that occurs by osmosis. Seal tubing securely with dialysis clips at both ends.
detailedSteps.zh: 将蛋白样品装入透析袋或透析盒，留 15–20% 顶空以容纳渗透作用导致的 10–20% 体积膨胀，两端用透析夹牢固密封。

detailedSteps.en: Submerge sealed dialysis unit in 500 mL (or ≥200× sample volume) of dialysis buffer in a beaker at 4°C. Stir gently with a magnetic stir bar (low speed — no foam to prevent protein denaturation). Dialyze for 2 h.
detailedSteps.zh: 将密封透析单元置于 500 mL（或 ≥200 倍样品体积）透析液中，4°C 磁力搅拌（低速、无泡沫以防蛋白变性），透析 2 h。

detailedSteps.en: Replace with fresh 500 mL dialysis buffer. Continue dialyzing at 4°C for another 2 h. Each buffer change removes >90% of the remaining small molecules.
detailedSteps.zh: 换入新鲜 500 mL 透析液，继续 4°C 透析 2 h。每次换液去除 >90% 的目标小分子。

detailedSteps.en: Replace with a third 500 mL fresh dialysis buffer. Dialyze overnight at 4°C (8–12 h). If the final protein will be stored at −80°C, add 10% glycerol to this last dialysis buffer.
detailedSteps.zh: 换入第三批新鲜透析液（500 mL），4°C 过夜透析（8–12 h）。若蛋白需 −80°C 保存，在末次透析液中加入 10% 甘油。

detailedSteps.en: Carefully remove the dialysis unit, dry the outside, and extract the protein sample with a pipette. Note that the sample volume may have increased due to osmotic water uptake.
detailedSteps.zh: 小心取出透析单元，擦干外壁，用移液器抽取蛋白样品，注意样品体积可能因渗透吸水而增加。

detailedSteps.en: Quantify the recovered protein concentration by BCA or Bradford assay. If the sample is too dilute, concentrate using an Amicon Ultra centrifugal filter (4,000×g, 4°C) with the same MWCO as the dialysis membrane. Aliquot and store at −80°C.
detailedSteps.zh: BCA 或 Bradford 法定量回收蛋白浓度。若样品过稀，用 Amicon Ultra 离心浓缩管（4,000×g，4°C，选与透析袋相同 MWCO）浓缩，分装后 −80°C 保存。

note.en: Loaded and sealed dialysis unit can be placed at 4°C and left for up to 1 h before starting dialysis.
note.zh: 装好密封的透析单元可在 4°C 放置最长 1 h 再开始透析。

note.en: Recovered protein can be stored at 4°C overnight, or aliquoted and frozen at −80°C for long-term storage.
note.zh: 回收的蛋白可 4°C 暂存过夜，或分装 −80°C 长期保存。
